query: add a `router.delete('/users/:id', ...)` handler that removes the user from `users` and responds 204 (no body) on success, 404 JSON `{error:'not found'}` if absent.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/router\.delete\s*\(\s*['\"]\/users\/:id['\"]/.test(s),'DELETE route missing');a.ok(/users\.delete\s*\(|delete\s+users\[/.test(s),'users.delete call missing');a.ok(/204\b/.test(s),'204 not used');a.ok(/404\b/.test(s),'404 branch missing');" $FILE

query: convert the named `export { router }` at the bottom to a default export. No other changes.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/export\s+default\s+router\s*;?\s*$/m.test(s),'default export missing');a.ok(!/export\s*\{\s*router\s*\}/.test(s),'named export still present');" $FILE
